body.raw:
# Heading

## Import

```jsx live=false
import { Heading } from '@node-real/bee';
```

## Usage

```jsx
<Heading>I'm a Heading</Heading>
```

## Sizes

```jsx
<>
  {/* fontSize = 60px */}
  <Heading size="h1" noOfLines={1}>
    (h1) In love with React & Next In love with React & Next
  </Heading>

  {/* fontSize = 56px */}
  <Heading size="h2" noOfLines={1}>
    (h2) In love with React & Next In love with React & Next
  </Heading>

  {/* fontSize = 40px */}
  <Heading size="h3" noOfLines={1}>
    (h3) In love with React & Next In love with React & Next
  </Heading>

  {/* fontSize = 32px */}
  <Heading size="h4" noOfLines={1}>
    (h4) In love with React & Next In love with React & Next
  </Heading>

  {/* fontSize = 24px */}
  <Heading size="s" noOfLines={1}>
    (s) In love with React & Next In love with React & Next
  </Heading>

  {/* fontSize = 20px */}
  <Heading size="xs" noOfLines={1}>
    (xs) In love with React & Next In love with React & Next
  </Heading>

  {/* fontSize = 16px */}
  <Heading size="b" noOfLines={1}>
    (b) In love with React & Next In love with React & Next
  </Heading>

  {/* fontSize = 14px */}
  <Heading size="pt" noOfLines={1}>
    (pt) In love with React & Next In love with React & Next
  </Heading>

  {/* fontSize = 12px */}
  <Heading size="pt2" noOfLines={1}>
    (pt2) In love with React & Next In love with React & Next
  </Heading>
</>
```

## Truncate

### Single Line

```jsx
<Heading isTruncated>Basic text writing, including headings, body text, lists, and more.</Heading>
```

### Multiline

```jsx
<Heading noOfLines={2}>
  Basic text writing, including headings, body text, lists, and more. Basic text writing, including
  headings, body text, lists, and more. Basic text writing, including headings, body text, lists,
  and more.
</Heading>
```

## Props

<PropsTable
  data={[
    {
      name: 'size',
      required: false,
      type: 'h1 | h2 | h3 | h4 | s | xs | b | pt | pt2',
      default: 'h1',
      desc: '',
    },
    {
      name: 'isTruncated',
      required: false,
      type: 'boolean',
      default: false,
      desc: 'For single line, render an ellipsis when the heading exceeds the width of the viewport or maxWidth prop',
    },
    {
      name: 'noOfLines',
      required: false,
      type: 'string | number',
      default: '',
      desc: 'For multiline, render an ellipsis when the heading exceeds the width of the viewport or maxWidth prop',
    },
  ]}
/>
